picks.quote: Greg Hackett gave his take on Jaron Boots Ennis versus Errol Spence, and he leaned toward Boots being able to handle that fight.
Spence can box, but I don't think he can keep it up all night, especially not against Boots.
Then Roy Jones Jr. leaned toward Boots being able to take that fight. Roy's point was that Boots has the kind of tools that can give Spence problems
Spence has the experience and style to test him in a way he has not fully dealt with yet. And that is why Ward believes Errol can beat him.
If Errol is healthy and close to his old self, it becomes a hard fight. But, if Spence has slowed down, Boots has the style to expose that fast.
